cells.text: Advertisement for a personal injury lawyer/firm
Any war or veterans' memorial
A mansard-roof Pizza Hut building (can be still operating as a Pizza Hut, have another business in it, or vacant; representative examples)

cells.category: Easy license plate letter/number game, only one per card from this category
cells.text: A license plate serial containing the letter A
A windmill (decorative or functional)
Any wild or domestic bird (in captivity accepted, live)
Any depiction of George Washington
Advertisement for a musical event/concert
Sign indicating a distance more than 250 miles
A sign marking a municipality border
A sign displaying the local current time
A yellow automobile (taxis and school buses count)
any photo of your choice
Any wildlife/animal warning sign
A vehicle with three or more bumper stickers
A damaged sign
Any object or place claiming in visible signage or its Google Maps POI to be the World's Largest of whatever it is
A sign advertising fireworks or fireworks store
A sign for an unincorporated place
A picture of the thing a street is named for, visible from or located on that street (e.g. a sunset taken from Sunset Boulevard; an oak tree on Oak Street)
Advertisement for any beer
A civil defense/weather siren
Any US state flag
Any wild or domestic mammal except a cat or dog (in captivity accepted, live)
Picture within or sign of US National Park (list)
